prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: MCN-IMFRKSDWR-3PC-10X6-BLCK-2PK Product Type: SPORT_WETSUIT Brand (from catalog): GEAR AID Existing Title: GEAR AID Wetsuit Repair Kit with Iron-On Neoprene Patch, Fix Seams and Tears, 2-pk Description: Extend the life of neoprene gear and fix it when it rips using Tenacious Tape Neoprene Patch.
Simply cut the 10"x6" patch to size and activate the adhesive using an iron to create a permanent repair for neoprene waders, wetsuits and more. Previously known as Iron Mend, this iron-on fabric patch kit can be used to reinforce seams and high-wear areas including elbows, knees and underarms. It's also designed to repair other stretchy fabrics like spandex and Lycra. For larger repairs or gear that is hard to iron like gloves, booties, and spray skirts, choose the Wetsuit Repair Kit that includes Aquaseal NEO. This flexible, black contact cement cures permanently within 30 minutes. It also seals leaky gaskets and bonds to coated materials and even latex. For ultra-stretch repair that lasts, use Tenacious Tape Iron-On Neoprene Patch or Aquaseal NEO. Search Terms: scuba diving wetsuit drysuit repair neoprene Features: - Fix tears permanently in neoprene wetsuits, gloves and waders with just a household iron and this heat-activated Tenacious Tape Neoprene Patch - Cut the black, 10"x6" fabric patch to size, and repair tears or reinforce elbows, knees and high-wear areas that require lots of flexibility and durability; also compatible with stretch fabrics like spandex and Lycra® - Choose the complete Wetsuit Repair Kit, which includes the Iron-On Neoprene Patch with Aquaseal NEO Contact Cement (1.5 fl oz) - Repair torn or ripped neoprene permanently in 30 minutes using Aquaseal NEO; cures to a black, flexible rubber and bonds to latex - Packaging may vary === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: GEAR AID Wetsuit Repair Kit Iron-On Neoprene Patch 2-pk
